title: EasyKoTH
description: EasyKoTH is a lightweight and beginner-friendly King of the Hill plugin for Minecraft 1.12.4 (Bukkit), featuring seamless WorldEdit integration for defining zones and automatic crate key rewards for winners using customizable commands.
body: EasyKoTH is a simple and lightweight King of the Hill plugin for Bukkit 1.12.4. Define KoTH zones using WorldEdit, start timed hill events, and automatically reward the winner with a crate key. Perfect for servers looking to add competitive capture points with minimal setup.
